title: Licensed Kids Minions Despicable Me Felt Embossed Christmas Stocking Holidays
description:
Get your child into the holiday spirit with the Disney Frozen 2 Kids Christmas Stocking! This cute stocking comes in a light purple color, and features the stars of the new hit Disney movie Frozen 2 - Anna, Elsa and even snowman Olaf! It's constructed of soft but durable felt that will last for years to come and comes with a hang loop that can easily be attached to any mantle. The stocking itself is very lightweight and measures 15.5" in length, so you can stuff it to the brim with toys, games, and accessories before Santa arrives and it will hang safely overnight. It has a seasonal embossed snowflake pattern that will brighten up any living room or den. If your child is a Frozen fanatic, then this Christmas stocking is the perfect home decor accessory this holiday season!

Get your child into the holiday spirit with the Despicable Me Minions Christmas stocking!

Key Features

  • SOFT MATERIAL - Made of Felt with Embossed Snowflake Pattern | Perfect Home Decor Addition this Holiday Season
  • HANG LOOP - Sturdy Hang Loop Easily Attaches to Any Mantle | Lasts for Many Years to Come
  • LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - Stocking Itself Weighs Just .08 Pounds (1.28 Ounces) | Fill With Gifts and Goodies and Hang Overnight

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LICSTOCK
  • UPC: 639277447906
  • Size: Large

This cute felt holiday stocking is embossed with a seasonal snowflake print and features the Minions from the hit Despicable Me movie franchise! It's constructed of soft but durable blue or red felt that will last for years to come and comes with a hang loop that can easily be attached to any mantle.

The stocking itself is super lightweight and measures 15.5" in length, so you can stuff it to the brim with toys, games, and accessories before Santa arrives and it will hang safely overnight. It has a seasonal embossed snowflake pattern that will brighten up any living room or den. If your child is a Minions fanatic, then this stocking is the perfect home decor accessory this holiday season!
